title: Section 43
content: 1[43. Record of insurance agents. --(1) Every insurer and every person who, acting on behalf of an insurer employs insurance agents shall maintain a record showing the name and address of every insurance agent appointed by him and the date on which his appointment began and the date, if any, on which his appointment ceased. (2) The record prepared by the insurer under sub-section (1), shall be maintained as long as the insurance agent is in service and for a period of five years after the cessation of appointment.]
footnote: 1.Subs. by Act 5 of 2015, s. 53, for section 43 (w.e.f. 26-12-2014).
